trivia: The shortened ERJ is a 37-seater that bridged airline flying and corporate shuttles. Many now serve charter and government roles, so its appearances can be delightfully unpredictable.
Shares everything with the ERJ-145 except length, which is why the resolver treats their codes with care.
funFacts: Basis of the Legacy 600 business jet lineage.
